text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the Mile Ch. is here! Hishi Akebono
has built up her physique and is in perfect form
for her rematch against Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unusually strong desire to win has the stands
riveted. Cheers for Hishi Akebono rain down from
every direction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Taiki Shuttle's fans are out in full force as
well! They're positive Taiki Shuttle is guaranteed
to win, and they're behind her 100%.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is electric. The curtain rises on the
epic, pulse-pounding clash!
